quote: We believe TYPO3 editors deserve the same UI quality shadcn gave React developers. So we built it once, properly: 244 elements, audited templates, themes you switch at runtime. Every agency rebuilding the same hero for the tenth time was the reason — and every editor who finally ships a beautiful page is the reward.
name: Mara Lindqvist
title: Founder & Design System Lead, webconsulting studio
